purpose: Classification only — determines which folder a document belongs to. No action routing.

rates_general_matters.name: Rates General Matters
rates_general_matters.description: Rates refunds, adjustments, extensions, overpayments, authority to act, deceased estates, reissue requests, paperless/email delivery
exclusions: No mention of rates, billing terms, or property ownership — even if about a property

regulated_premises.name: Regulated Premises
regulated_premises.description: Food business registration, food trucks, mobile vendors, home-based food, beauty salons, skin clinics, tattooing, waxing, skin penetration, health inspections, compliance
exclusions: Payment confirmations, fees, or financial statements only → Finance folders
Waste logistics (collection, bins, delivery, pickup) → Waste Management
Unsanitary waste from neighbouring properties (pests, hygiene) routes HERE not Waste

onsite_sewage_management.name: Onsite Sewage Management Septic Service Reports
onsite_sewage_management.description: Septic system servicing, inspection, OSSM reports, quarterly maintenance, garden master work, residential sewage treatment compliance
exclusions: If 'septic' appears with invoice/payment/fee/reminder terms → Financial Management Debtors

waste_management_operations.name: Waste Management Operations Collection Services
waste_management_operations.description: Bin requests (new, missing, stolen, damaged, repair), waste collection issues, bulk waste, mattress pickup, extra bins
exclusions: If 'blue disc' is mentioned → Undetermined
Issue about another person's waste or public dumping with no sender collection request → exclude
Abandoned waste in public with no sender request → Environmental Compliance Illegal Dumping
Unsanitary waste from neighbours (pests/hygiene) → Regulated Premises
Waste + payment/costs only → exclude from here

regulation_of_parking.name: Regulation of Parking
regulation_of_parking.description: Parking fines, illegal/improper parking, infringement notices, vehicles blocking driveways/school zones/roads, ranger enforcement, truck parking

financial_management_debtors.name: Financial Management Debtors
financial_management_debtors.description: Unpaid invoices, overdue accounts, account receivables, billing follow-ups, invoice requests/amendments, balance inquiries
exclusions: If 'remittance' is mentioned → exclude
If real estate/property manager + amount received by council → Remittance Statements (unless requesting new invoice or overdue language)
Must contain clear reference to financial debt or receivable

companion_animals.name: Companion Animals
companion_animals.description: Pet registration, microchipping, desexing, lifetime registration, wandering/stray/barking/lost pets, rehoming, cat and dog licensing
exclusions: Dog attack or public danger event → exclude
Violence or aggression → exclude

building_control_property_enquiries.name: Building Control Property Enquiries
building_control_property_enquiries.description: Development applications, planning enquiries, fences, sheds, carports, pools, retaining walls, dwellings, subdivision, zoning, land use, Build Over Asset approvals
exclusions: Regulated business activity → Regulated Premises
Roads or public infrastructure → Roads folders

fire_safety_services.name: Fire Safety Services
fire_safety_services.description: Annual Fire Safety Statements (AFS/AFSS), fire inspections, fire-related demolition, fire compliance documents, certifications, fire protection systems
exclusions: If 'fire' is not connected to safety, inspection, demolition, or AFSS → exclude

roads_development_services.name: Roads Development Services and Roads Act Applications
roads_development_services.description: Section 138 approvals, driveway works, road access applications, RA references (RA-YYYY-XXXX), road restoration plans, S138 inspections
exclusions: Customer request to repair existing road conditions (potholes, erosion, gutter) → Roads Maintenance
Phrases like 'fix the problem', 'washed away with rain', 'surface deteriorated' → Roads Maintenance

roads_maintenance.name: Roads Maintenance Correspondence Incoming
roads_maintenance.description: Potholes, gravel, grading, footpath damage, unsealed road damage, general road upkeep, road sealing/widening/clearing requests
exclusions: If Section 138 or driveway application → Roads Development Services

rates_name_address_change.name: Rates Name/Address Change or Ownership Update Requests
rates_name_address_change.description: Mailing address changes, property ownership updates, agent-managed updates, postal corrections, name adjustments, email changes linked to rates accounts
exclusions: Water flow, stormwater runoff, drainage problems → Sewerage Drainage
Requests for email/paperless rate notices → Rates General Matters

nhvr_applications_request.name: National Heavy Vehicle Regulator Applications Request
nhvr_applications_request.description: NHVR consent requests, applications, case IDs awaiting response, council action/input/approval for vehicle permits
exclusions: If message confirms permit issuance or final approval → NHVR Permit Issued

nhvr_permit_issued.name: National Heavy Vehicle Regulator Application Permit Issued
nhvr_permit_issued.description: NHVR permit confirmations, approved submissions, regulatory/logistics updates for heavy vehicle movement approvals
exclusions: If both 'Consent Request' and 'Permit' appear → NHVR Applications Request

remittance_statements.name: Remittance Statements
remittance_statements.description: Payment confirmations from real estate agents, property managers, strata groups confirming income/payment received by Council
exclusions: Must come from real estate, property, or strata entity
If requesting new invoice or overdue language → Financial Management Debtors

finance_remittance_advices.name: Finance Remittance Advices
finance_remittance_advices.description: Vendor/supplier/third-party payment confirmations to Council — NOT property or rates related
exclusions: If 'rates' appears anywhere → Remittance Statements
If from real estate or strata managers → Remittance Statements
Must NOT confirm rental or property-related income

environmental_compliance_illegal_dumping.name: Environmental Compliance Illegal Dumping
environmental_compliance_illegal_dumping.description: Dumped rubbish, abandoned waste, unauthorized disposal, RID/RIDOnline incidents, public complaints about illegal dumping
exclusions: Routine collection failure → Waste Management Operations

sewerage_drainage.name: Sewerage Drainage Customer Request Management Correspondence
sewerage_drainage.description: Stormwater, sewerage, water runoff, culverts, flooding, drainage issues, creek blockages, gutter/kerb drainage, pipe issues
exclusions: If core intent is financial (confirming/requesting invoices) → Remittance Statements or Financial Management Debtors

junk.name: Junk
junk.description: Marketing emails, newsletters, spam, automated notifications, vendor promotions, and other non-council-business correspondence
exclusions: If the email contains a genuine council service request, complaint, or application → route to the appropriate department
If the sender is a known council stakeholder or resident with a real issue → not junk

undetermined.name: Undetermined
undetermined.description: Fallback when: (1) inference engine crashes or fails, (2) document details cannot be matched to any folder, (3) ambiguous routing after exclusion logic, (4) insufficient detail in message body

development_application.name: Development Application
development_application.description:
AI Overview
A Development Application (DA) on the NSW Planning Portal is
an online, mandatory submission for obtaining approval to carry out building, subdivision, or land use changes. It acts as the central digital platform for lodging, paying fees, and tracking progress, replacing paper submissions. 
Key Usage Examples of DA in the NSW Portal

    Lodging New Projects: Submitting applications for building 1 or 2-storey homes, renovations, or granny flats.
    Site Analysis: Utilizing the Spatial Viewer to check zoning, flood, bushfire, or heritage constraints.
    Tracking Status: Monitoring real-time status of applications from lodgement to determination via the Application Tracker.
    Document Uploads: Submitting essential documents like Statement of Environmental Effects, cost reports, and owner’s consent.
    Public Submissions: Viewing and commenting on State Significant Applications currently on exhibition
exclusions: If email mentions 'building certificate' or 'construction certification' → Building Certificates folder (separate from planning)
If email is about 'strata management' or 'owners corporation meeting' → Strata Management folder
If email discusses 'planning permit appeal' without mentioning NSW Planning Portal → Appeals & Tribunals folder

global_rules.attachment_dependency: If attachments must be opened to understand the issue and message body lacks sufficient info → Undetermined
global_rules.multi_folder_ambiguity: If multiple folders seem plausible after exclusion logic → Undetermined
global_rules.inference_failure: If the inference engine crashes, times out, or returns an error → Undetermined
